items.title: EV sales just hit their best month since federal tax credits ended
items.body: New EV prices continued to slide in May, even as sales climbed to their strongest level since the Trump administration killed federal EV tax credits last fall.

items.title: Tesla claims boost Giga Berlin production 20%, but numbers don’t add up
